themes: The backlog is overwhelmingly composed of Manager-level contacts, signaling strong demand for improvements to day-to-day location management workflows, reporting efficiency, and time savings across multi-location brands.

Several accounts appear multiple times with different contacts and escalating wait times — notably Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn Express, and Ford — indicating systemic unresolved needs that may require coordinated account-level responses.

Wait times span from 6 to over 350 days, with the majority of contacts waiting well over 100 days, reflecting a critical need to prioritize outreach and close the feedback loop before further churn risk or dissatisfaction compounds.
